title: Eroxen's Wireless Redstone
description: Adds Create-mod inspired Redstone Links to the game for Wireless Redstone transfer
body:
Demonstration video: https://youtu.be/Oox1FWK4520

This datapack adds wireless redstone transfer to Minecraft! As you can probably tell from the video and images, this pack takes inspiration from the Create mod.

This pack adds 1 block to the game: the Redstone Link. You can craft this item using one Ender Pearl and a Redstone Torch. This item functions both as the transmitter and the receiver: you can form a transmitter by placing it on blocks that can be powered, such as Note Blocks and Redstone Lamps. You form a receiver by placing it on a Target Block.

You can set the frequency of a Redstone Link by placing items into the two slots in front. You can just right-click your items on there, and left-click to remove them. This does not consume the item. Both slots need to have an item for the link to work.

The Redstone Links can also transfer signal strength: simply place the link on blocks that have a signal strength, such as Comparators or Redstone Wire.
